expectations.text: Runs the ecosystem status check script
expectations.evidence: Used pgrep and launchctl. No knowledge of ecosystem_status.py.

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Tax PDF Organizer status
expectations.evidence: Only searched for 'tax' in process names. Could not identify the system or its status.

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Monarch Money MCP Server status
expectations.evidence: Only searched for 'monarch' in process names and LaunchAgents. Could not identify it.

expectations.text: Indicates whether each is running, idle, or down
expectations.evidence: Said both were 'not found' but could not distinguish between down, idle, or not-installed.

expectations.text: Does not confuse status checking with configuration
expectations.evidence: Stayed focused on checking running status. Did not suggest changing any configuration.
